issues.sample: COMING TO A STOP LIGHT  I NOTICED THAT MY GAUGE CLUSTER WASN'T WORKING (COMPLETELY BLANK), AS I CAME TO A STOP I HONKED MY HORN TO GAUGE IT'S POWER AND THEN MY BIKE SHUT OFF COMPLETELY. TRIED JUMPING THE BIKE WHICH WAS SUCCESSFUL IN GETTING IT TO RUN AGAIN, BUT DIED SHORTLY AFTER

narrative.headline: What 2012 Kawasaki Ninja Zx-6r owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electronic Stability Control (Esc) (50% of reports).
